title: Feathered dog
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Conjecture|legends}}
[[File:FeatheredDog-KOTOR1.jpg|thumb|250px]]

The '''feathered dog''' was a domesticated [[Reptavian/Legends|reptavian]] kept as a pet on [[Taris/Legends|Taris]] prior to and during the [[Mandalorian Wars]]. Any of these creatures still living on-planet at the time of the [[Jedi Civil War]] were likely killed when [[Darth Malak]] subjected the planet to an orbital bombardment.

==Behind the scenes==
This creatures looks similar to the [[Varactyl/Legends|varactyl]], a species native to [[Utapau/Legends|Utapau]]. It also looks similar to a [[Mooka/Legends|mooka]]. It may be a smaller cousin of the [[Mastiff phalone/Legends|mastiff phalone]], which is native to [[Maridun/Legends|Maridun]].

==Appearances==
*[[Knights of the Old Republic 1|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 1]]
*[[Knights of the Old Republic 6|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 6]]
